rulings.Case Title: BETTY UTTERBACK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Amend Their Designation Of Expert Witnesses And Produce Dr. Herman Bruch For Deposition
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JULY 14, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 A.M., LINE 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to amend their designation of expert witnesses and produce Dr. Herman Bruch for deposition: hearing required. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT NELSON et al VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One From Defendant Georgia Pacific, Llc., And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JULY 14, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 A.M., LINE 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further responses to plaintiffs¿ requests for production, inspection and copying of documents and tangible things, set one, from defendant Georgia Pacific LLC and request for sanctions is continued to July 21 per the parties¿ request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs' Interrogatories From Defendant Webcor Builders, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JULY 14, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 A.M., LINE 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiffs¿ interrogatories from defendant Webcor Builders, Inc. is denied. The moving parties did not engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts prior to filing the motion. = (220/HEK)
